task_description: A network event at 04:59 UTC triggered an automatic failover in the 'api-gateway' service. A bug in the failover logic left the service in a broken state with zero active connections.

commits.author: dave@company.com
commits.message: perf: upgrade auth validator dependency version
commits.diff:
--- a/api-gateway-service/auth_validator.go
+++ b/api-gateway-service/auth_validator.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 5
+config.Timeout = 5 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load

infra_events.description: Network degradation detected on primary subnet. Packet loss 15%, latency spike 450ms. Triggered automatic failover procedures.
Routine certificate rotation completed. No impact reported.
Routine kernel update completed. No impact reported.
Routine certificate rotation completed. No impact reported.
Routine dns update completed. No impact reported.
Routine az failover completed. No impact reported.
